$comment: Consolidated input schemas for the Sheaf MCP operations exposed by `sheaf serve`. Human-readable companion with example prompts and output types: docs/mcp/tools.md. Wire protocol: docs/mcp/api.md. Descriptions match the server's tools/list output. JSON Schema draft-07.

tools.name: list_libraries
tools.description: List libraries in the corpus with element/profile/finding counts

tools.name: library_snapshot
tools.description: Return all ContractElements, CoverageProfiles and Findings for one library — the bulk read used by the report generator

library.description: Library name as returned by list_libraries.

tools.name: query_contract
tools.description: Return ContractElement and its CoverageProfile (or a subtree)

element_id.description: Canonical element ID, e.g. "kubectl get" or "fuchsia.io/Directory.Open".

subtree.description: Optional. Narrow the response to one coverage bucket instead of the full profile.

tools.name: coverage
tools.description: Return the CoverageProfile for an element

tools.name: find_coverage_gaps
tools.description: List findings, filterable by library and kind

library.description: Optional. Filter to one library (accepts the <lib>/ and <lib>. prefixes).

kinds.description: Optional. Filter to these finding kinds; the FINDING_KIND_ prefix is also accepted.

tools.name: find_examples
tools.description: Search for elements matching a query (semantic if embedder configured, else token-overlap)

query.description: Natural-language description of the behavior you want an element for.

tools.name: verify_invocation
tools.description: Check whether an invocation string matches a real element

invocation.description: The element ID / call the agent is about to emit, e.g. "fuchsia.io/Directory.Open".

tools.name: review_pr
tools.description: Run a PR review: scan base + head paths, render comment, optionally post via configured review adapter

base_path.description: Working tree at the PR base commit.

head_path.description: Working tree at the PR head commit.

post.description: Post via the configured review adapter; print-only when false.

tools.name: tools/list
tools.description: MCP convention: list the operations this server exposes
